content.headline: Fast, Scalable Development—Web, Mobile, APIs & SaaS
content.subtitle: From frontend to backend, web apps to mobile apps and admin panels—we deliver future-ready software powered by AI and modern tools. Built to scale, shipped in weeks.

content.pitch: We help ambitious teams build world-class software—web apps, mobile apps, APIs, and SaaS—that ships fast, scales easily, and stays maintainable. Your vision. Our AI-assisted development. Results in weeks.
content.tagline: Your vision. Our development expertise. Results in weeks.
content.author: DOTR Development Team

problems.title: Slow, Fragmented Builds
problems.description: Lengthy development cycles, legacy tech debt, and handoff friction between frontend and backend—delaying launches and eating into budgets.

problems.title: Can't Scale or Maintain
problems.description: Monolithic codebases, poor architecture, and no clear path to scale. Every new feature feels like a gamble.

problems.title: Outdated Tech Stack
problems.description: Stuck on old frameworks and tools that can't support modern UX, APIs, or AI—limiting growth and innovation.

problems.title: Vendor Lock-in or Silos
problems.description: Working with separate teams for web, mobile, and backend creates inconsistency, delays, and higher costs.

content.empathy_text: We get it. You need software that ships fast, scales easily, and stays maintainable. DOTR brings full-stack development, modern tools, and AI-assisted workflows so you build once and scale without rewriting.

content.headline: End-to-End Development—Web, Mobile, APIs, SaaS—Fast & Future-Ready
supporting_points: Full stack: Frontend, Backend, Web Apps, Mobile Apps, Admin Panels, APIs & SaaS—one partner, one codebase philosophy
AI-assisted development (e.g. GitHub Copilot) and modern stack (Lovable, Supabase) for faster, higher-quality delivery
Scalable architecture from day one—no rewrites when you grow
CMS-driven content and admin panels so you control every piece without touching code
CI/CD, cloud-ready (AWS, GCP, Azure), and built for ongoing maintenance and optimization

items.description: Modern React, TypeScript, and backend services. Responsive UIs, APIs, and databases built to scale. One stack, end-to-end.

items.description: Fast, SEO-friendly websites and web applications. CMS-driven content, programmatic pages, and conversion-focused experiences.

items.title: Admin Panels & Dashboards
items.description: Powerful internal tools and dashboards. Manage content, users, and data with intuitive, role-based admin experiences.

items.title: APIs & SaaS Platforms
items.description: RESTful and modern APIs, multi-tenant SaaS, and scalable platform architecture. Built for integration and growth.

items.title: Security & Maintenance
items.description: Application security, backups, and ongoing optimization. Your product stays fast, secure, and up to date.

content.description: We take your specs and ideas from concept to production-ready software. Our AI-assisted development and modern stack (Lovable, Supabase) ensure every feature, API, and admin panel ships fast and scales with your business. Whether you need a web app, mobile app, or full SaaS platform—we've got you covered.

content.story: At DOTR, development isn't a silo—it's at the heart of everything we build. We combine frontend, backend, web apps, mobile, and APIs into one cohesive offering, powered by AI-assisted workflows and a modern stack that scales. From day one, we've believed that great software should ship fast, scale easily, and stay maintainable.
content.mission: To deliver development that drives results: faster time to market, scalable architecture, and full control via CMS-driven admin. We help teams build software that performs, converts, and grows.
content.vision: To be the go-to development partner for teams who want end-to-end software—from MVP to scale—without the usual agency friction or legacy tech debt.

sections.title: Development Services FAQ
sections.subtitle: Common questions about our development offering

items.question: What development services does DOTR offer?
items.answer: We offer five core development pillars: Frontend, Backend & Full-Stack; Web Apps & Websites; Mobile Applications; Admin Panels & Dashboards; and APIs & SaaS Platforms. You can use one or combine several—we deliver as a cohesive offering with shared architecture and tooling.

items.question: How do you use AI in development?
items.answer: We use AI-assisted tools like GitHub Copilot to accelerate coding, reduce boilerplate, and maintain consistency. Architecture and key decisions stay human-led; AI helps us ship faster without sacrificing quality.

items.question: How fast can I get a first build or MVP?
items.answer: Typically within 2–4 weeks for an initial build or MVP, depending on scope. We'll give you a clear timeline and milestones during discovery.

items.question: Do you build mobile apps as well as web?
items.answer: Yes. We build web apps, mobile applications (cross-platform and native), admin panels, and APIs. Many clients get web + admin + API from us in one project.

items.question: Is the content editable without code changes?
items.answer: Yes. We build CMS-driven experiences where sections, pages, CTAs, and content are manageable from the admin panel. Your team can update copy and structure without deploying code.

items.question: What tech stack do you use?
items.answer: We use modern, scalable technologies: React, TypeScript, Lovable, Supabase for backend and real-time, n8n for automation, and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) for deployment. We choose the stack that fits your project and scale.
